name: vpsops
description: Secure VPS setup, relay design, auditing, and maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Secure VPS setup, relay design, and health checks.
interface.longDescription: A reusable workflow for safe first access, single VPS deployment, optional relay topologies, and repeatable health audits.
defaultPrompt: Use $vpsops to securely bootstrap my new VPS.
Use $vpsops to audit this VPS without changing it.
Use $vpsops to design an optional relay and landing topology.
